Ensure that the Seal Number captured during truck loading (already present in HL60 Rub112) is correctly mapped, included in JSON printing, and displayed in the DN “comment” field for all MOP shipments requiring seal documentation.
h3. *KPIs*
 * *KPI 1:* 100% of Romanian DNs include the Seal Number automatically in the “comment” field.
 * *KPI 2:* Reduce manual edits of DNs to *0* for MOP operators.
